reasoning: XLK (Tech) +2.79% significantly outperforming SPY (+1.78%) with XLF (Financials) +0.82% in support = classic risk-on rotation. Energy -0.91% confirms rotation OUT of commodities INTO growth. Sector breadth is broad (2 of 3 major sectors >0.5% up), not narrow tech-only. Financials leadership suggests yield curve normalization supporting broad upside. Bullish bias with high confidence — sector internals confirm strength heading into today.
key_observations: XLK +2.79%: Tech significantly outperforming — growth leadership is the dominant force
XLF +0.82%: Financials supporting, confirming breadth beyond tech alone — yield normalization signal
XLE -0.91%: Energy weakness = rotation out of defensive hedges — low commodity demand expected
Overall rotation: Strong risk-on. SPY typically follows tech outperformance at 30% weight, supported by financial gains.
